TtT NFtTfUic -1 TTY .-- 1. 7.3TT. 324(3?), cTfM 6 q7i, 2007 1 MINISTRY OF RURAL DEVELOPMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi. the 2nd April. 2008 S.O. 802(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 29 of the National Rural Employment Guarantee Act, 2005 (42 of 2005), the Central Government, on being satisfied that it is necessary and (1) -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [ PART l I--SFr. 3(ii )J expedient so to do. hereby makes the following further amendments in Schedule 11 to the said Act, namely :-- 2. In the said Schedule, for paragraph'-', the following paragraph shall be substituted, namely :- "2. (1) It shall be the dutA of the Gram Pa.ncha%at to register the household, after making such enquiry as it deems fit. and issue a Job Card containing the following essenti,41 details.-of registered adult members of the household. nemely :- (i) (n) Job Card number:: household member-wise work demand and allocation: (iii) description of the work done: (iv) dates and days worked: (v) muster roll numbers by which wages have been paid: (Ni) amount of wages paid: (vii) unemployment allovyance. if any paid: (viii) postal account 'bank account number: (ix) insurance policy number: and (x) elector's photo identity card number voters identity, if any. (2) All entries in the Job Card -shall be duly authenticated, by signature of an authorised. officer. (3) The Job Card issued under sub-paragarph (1) shall bear the photographs of only the registered adult members of the households to whom the Job Card has been issued. (4) No photograph. name or details of any person other than that of the registered adult rnembrs of the household to whom that Job Card belongs shall be affixed or recorded in the Job Card. (5) All Job Cards shall be in the custody of the Job Card holders to whom they belong. [F.No.J-11013 1,2008 NiREG.A1 AMITA SHARMA. Jt. Secy. Note.-Schedule lI to the National Rural Employment Guarantee Act. 2005 (42 of 2005) has been amended tide following notification numbers :- 1. S.O. 324(E). dated 6th March. 2007.
